entries.back_en: Exactly! Exactly.
Master Haku, thy destiny and ours are intertwined
like the vine to the stem!
By no means! The idea of abandoning thee
tortured my heart. Ukon allowed me to stay
entries.note: 'bade me stay' = told/ordered to stay; 'permitiu' = permitted, slight shift.

entries.back_en: when I asked him such a favor.
But to tell the truth -- poor Maroro was
so frightened that his heart nearly leapt from his chest!
Ah, but I wish my companions had
told me the plan! Is Maroro so unworthy of trust?
Just because you had a pair of tits
entries.note: 'you've gotta great pair' is present and includes 'great'; target uses past 'tinha' and drops 'great'.

entries.back_en: in your face, do you have to believe everything
she says?
Shut up! You all saw them. A man has his limits
entries.note: 'only got so much willpower' adapted as 'tem seus limites', acceptable.

entries.back_en: with those things right in front of him!
Heh... Bad luck for The Chest, though. I bet she
entries.note: Nickname 'The Chest' kept as 'O Peito'; acceptable.

entries.back_en: never dreamed there's a secret passage.
What a nice little surprise, you falling
entries.note: 'gostosa' adds lewd tone matching Moznu's character; acceptable.

entries.back_en: into my lap again? Like moths to the flame,
aren't you?
Heh heh. I'll go all out on the affection
entries.note: 'plenty of lovin'' = caprichar no carinho, conveys intent.

entries.back_en: after we get out of here.
All right, boys! Tie the women up, and give the
